protein_name: May play an important role in fibrillogenesis by controlling lateral growth of collagen II fibrils. Belongs to the fibrillar collagen family. 9 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Biological Process: cartilage development; collagen fibril organization; roof of mouth development; sensory perception of sound; skeletal system development; skeletal system morphogenesis; soft palate development
